context: Tests whether the agent builds a PaperKit document markup setup using the correct data model, controller, insertion UI, PencilKit tool picker bridge, persistence, and HDR property names.

checklist.name: Markup model
checklist.description: Creates a PaperMarkup model with bounds matching the document or view content.

checklist.name: Shared feature set
checklist.description: Creates PaperMarkupViewController with a shared FeatureSet such as .latest and reuses that same feature set for insertion UI.

checklist.name: Tool picker
checklist.description: Retains a PKToolPicker, adds the PaperMarkupViewController as an observer, and assigns it through pencilKitResponderState.activeToolPicker with a visible or hidden toolPickerVisibility.

checklist.name: Insertion UI
checklist.description: Uses MarkupEditViewController(supportedFeatureSet:additionalActions:) and connects its delegate to PaperMarkupViewController or an equivalent forwarding delegate.

checklist.name: Async persistence
checklist.description: Saves with try await PaperMarkup.dataRepresentation() and loads with PaperMarkup(dataRepresentation:).

checklist.name: HDR property
checklist.description: Uses FeatureSet.colorMaximumLinearExposure and PKToolPicker.colorMaximumLinearExposure, not maximumLinearExposure.

checklist.name: No entitlement
checklist.description: Does not claim PaperKit requires a special entitlement or Info.plist key.
